title: DeleteMail
text: DeleteMail Delete the specified email message from the POP3 server. DeleteMail( MessageNr ) Parameters Parameter Type Direction Description MessageNr numeric IN Number of the message that should be deleted from the POP3 server. Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $status Value Description 0 DeleteMail succeeded < 0 DeleteMail failed -7 Invalid message number -8 Not logged on -9 Socket error -10 Miscellaneous error Use Use after a connection to the mail server has been established with the LogonMail operation. Description The DeleteMail operation deletes the specified email message from the POP3 server. Explain this code activate "UPOPMail".DeleteMail(1) Copy Related Links Retrieving Email Messages You can retrieve MIME-compliant email messages by calling operations on the UPOPMAIL component.
